title: caladenia citrina
intro: Caladenia citrina, also known as the lemon-leaf spider orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory problems. Caladenia citrina has been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Caladenia citrina can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
